NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
THE ASCENDANT OF YEAR (VARSHA LAGNA)
SOURCE : 1
Ever since the use of Muntha in Tajik system of delineation came into use, astrologers in
India started using the ascendant of the annual horoscope. The use of Sudharshan chakra,
where transits are used for delineation of the chart along with the Ascendant, sun and
Moon, TRANSITS played an important role in prognostication. Further the Moon chart
(or Chandra Lagna) is also popularly used.
Shri Chitnis has incorporated all these ancient methods in the Paribhraman Padathi and
attempted to use them in the system.
- If Varsha Lagnesh (Ascendant Lord of the Year) falls in 1st, 2nd, 4th, 5th, 7th or 9th,
